title: Fix MongoDB Projection to Handle Optional Fields

statement.markdown: Write a function `mongo_projection` that takes an object `document` and an object `projection`. The function should return a new object that contains the fields specified in `projection`. If a field is not specified, it should be included in the output object only if its value in `document` is not null. If the field does not exist in `document`, it should not be included in the output object. The function should handle cases where `projection` contains optional fields with null or undefined values.
statement.notes: Time complexity: O(n), where n is the number of fields in the document.

constraints.description: Number of fields in the document

hints.text: Use the `$ifNull` operator to handle cases where a field is not specified in `projection` but has a non-null value in `document`.

editorial.title: Editorial Solution
editorial.intuition: The function should use the `$ifNull` operator to handle cases where a field is not specified in `projection` but has a non-null value in `document`.
editorial.bruteForce: One possible solution is to use a loop to iterate over the fields in `document` and include them in the output object only if they are specified in `projection` or have a non-null value.
editorial.betterSolution: A better solution is to use the `$ifNull` operator to handle cases where a field is not specified in `projection` but has a non-null value in `document`.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use the `$ifNull` operator and a loop to iterate over the fields in `projection` and include them in the output object only if they are specified or have a non-null value.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The function should return a new object that contains the fields specified in `projection` and includes fields with non-null values in `document` that are not specified in `projection`.
editorial.dryRun: Example run of the function with the following input: `{'name': 'John', 'age': 30, 'city': 'New York'}` and `{'name': 1, 'age': 1, 'city': 1}`
commonMistakes: Including fields with null values in the output object
Not handling cases where a field is not specified in `projection` but has a non-null value in `document`
